headline: Wall Street Analysts Think PG&E (PCG) Could Surge 37.84%: Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for PG&E (PCG) points to a 37.8% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
